member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapException
member.summary: Base exception for all SmartWsdlKit related errors.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a SOAP service returns a SOAP Fault.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.FaultCode
member.summary: Gets the fault code (e.g., soap:Client, soap:Server, or Soap 1.2 codes like Value, Receiver).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.FaultString
member.summary: Gets the fault string/reason describing the error.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.FaultActor
member.summary: Gets the actor/role that caused the fault.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.DetailXml
member.summary: Gets the detailed XML string of the fault, if provided.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParseException
member.summary: Exception thrown when parsing of WSDL fails.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParseException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParseException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParseException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and inner exception.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SchemaValidationException
member.summary: Exception thrown when XML Schema validation fails.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SchemaValidationException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SchemaValidationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SchemaValidationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and inner exception.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.OpenApiGenerator
member.summary: Generates OpenAPI 3.x specifications and JSON Schemas from WSDL metadata.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.OpenApiGenerator.Generate(SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument)
member.summary: Generates an OpenAPI 3.0 JSON specification string from WSDL metadata.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment
member.summary: Represents an attachment for SOAP requests (MTOM or SOAP with Attachments).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.ContentId
member.summary: Gets the unique Content-ID of the attachment.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.ContentType
member.summary: Gets the MIME content type of the attachment (e.g. "application/octet-stream" or "image/png").

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.Data
member.summary: Gets the raw binary data of the attachment.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.FileName
member.summary: Gets the optional filename of the attachment.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.#ctor(System.String,System.Byte[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The raw binary payload of the attachment.
The MIME type of the content.
Optional filename associated with this payload.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsSecurityPasswordType
member.summary: Type of password encoding for WS-Security UsernameToken.

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.WsSecurityPasswordType.Plaintext
member.summary: Plaintext password (PasswordText).

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.WsSecurityPasswordType.PasswordDigest
member.summary: Hash password with Nonce and Created timestamp (PasswordDigest).

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.ApiKeyLocation
member.summary: Location of the API Key.

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.ApiKeyLocation.Header
member.summary: In the HTTP header.

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.ApiKeyLocation.Query
member.summary: In the query string.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient
member.summary: A high-performance, thread-safe, async-first SOAP client.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.Diagnostics
member.summary: Gets all diagnostics log entries collected when EnableDiagnostics is true.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.GetLastDiagnostic
member.summary: Gets the last diagnostics log entry collected.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.ClearDiagnostics
member.summary: Clears all diagnostics logs.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.Options
member.summary: Gets the configuration options used by this client.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.#ctor(SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using a base URL.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.#ctor(SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with NTLM authentication credentials.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.FromWsdl(System.String,SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates a SoapClient dynamically by loading and parsing WSDL metadata.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.FromWsdlAsync(System.String,SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates a SoapClient dynamically by loading and parsing WSDL metadata asynchronously.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.WithBasicAuth(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Configures Basic Authentication.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.WithBearerToken(System.String)
member.summary: Configures Bearer Token Authentication.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.WithApiKey(System.String,System.String,SmartWsdlKit.ApiKeyLocation)
member.summary: Configures API Key Authentication.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.WithWsSecurity(System.String,System.String,SmartWsdlKit.WsSecurityPasswordType)
member.summary: Configures WS-Security UsernameToken authentication.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.WithNtlmAuth(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Configures NTLM authentication fluently.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.EnableDiagnostics
member.summary: Enables diagnostics inspector logging fluently.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.Operation(System.String)
member.summary: Initiates a SOAP operation request builder.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClient.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes internal HttpClient handler resources.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder to construct and trigger a SOAP operation request.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.With(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a parameters to the SOAP request body.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.WithSoapHeader(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Appends a custom XML header to the SOAP Header element.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.WithSoapHeader(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Appends a custom SOAP header element with a name and value (serialized in target namespace).

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.WithSoapHeader(System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Appends a custom SOAP header element with a name, namespace, and value.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.WithHttpHeader(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a custom HTTP header to this specific request.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.WithAttachment(System.String,System.Byte[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a SOAP attachment (MTOM or SOAP with Attachments) to the request.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.WithBody(System.String)
member.summary: Overrides the request SOAP body with raw XML.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.WithBody(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Overrides the request SOAP body with an XML element.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.WithSoapAction(System.String)
member.summary: Overrides the SOAP Action HTTP Header or content-type action parameter.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the SOAP request asynchronously and returns the response metadata.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the SOAP request asynchronously and deserializes the response directly into the specified type.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapOperationBuilder.ExecuteAsync(System.Type,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the SOAP request asynchronously and deserializes the response directly into the specified type.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResponse
member.summary: Represents the result of a SOAP invocation containing raw and parsed XML.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResponse.RawXml
member.summary: Gets the raw XML string returned by the SOAP endpoint.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResponse.Body
member.summary: Gets the parsed XML Body element inside the SOAP Envelope.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResponse.As``1
member.summary: Deserializes the first child element of the SOAP Body into the specified type using XML reflection serialization.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResponse.As(System.Type)
member.summary: Deserializes the first child element of the SOAP Body into the specified type using XML reflection serialization.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResponse.ToDictionary
member.summary: Deserializes the SOAP response body element dynamically to a Dictionary structure.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachmentMode
member.summary: Supported attachment encoding protocols.

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachmentMode.SwA
member.summary: SOAP with Attachments (multipart/related where root part is text/xml or application/soap+xml).

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachmentMode.Mtom
member.summary: Message Transmission Optimization Mechanism (multipart/related where root part is application/xop+xml).

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the SoapClient.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.BaseAddress
member.summary: Gets or sets the base endpoint address of the SOAP service.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTTP request timeout. Default is 30 seconds.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.RetryCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of retry attempts for failed requests. Default is 0.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.RetryDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets the delay between retries. Default is 2 seconds.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.Proxy
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTTP proxy.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.Cookies
member.summary: Gets or sets the container used to store cookies.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.UserAgent
member.summary: Gets or sets the User-Agent header value.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.CustomHeaders
member.summary: Gets or sets custom HTTP request headers.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.SslProtocols
member.summary: Gets or sets the SSL/TLS protocols to enable.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.ServerCertificateCustomValidationCallback
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback to validate server certificates. Useful for bypassing validation in development environments.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.RequestEncoding
member.summary: Gets or sets the character encoding for the request payload. Default is UTF-8.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.ResponseEncoding
member.summary: Gets or sets the character encoding used to parse responses if not specified by the content type. Default is UTF-8.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.BackchannelHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets a custom HttpMessageHandler for mock testing or specialized connection management.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.AttachmentMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the attachment encoding mode (SwA or MTOM). Default is SwA.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.EnableResilience
member.summary: Gets or sets whether custom lightweight retry and circuit breaker logic is enabled. Default is false.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.CircuitBreakerFailureThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the consecutive failure threshold to open the circuit. Default is 5.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.CircuitBreakerResetTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration the circuit breaker stays open before attempting reset. Default is 30 seconds.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.EnableDiagnostics
member.summary: Gets or sets whether SOAP traffic diagnostics inspector logging is enabled. Default is false.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapClientOptions.Credentials
member.summary: Gets or sets network credentials (e.g. for NTLM/Kerberos authentication).

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog
member.summary: Holds diagnostic log details for SOAP service invocations.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.OperationName
member.summary: Gets the name of the operation called.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.EndpointUrl
member.summary: Gets the target endpoint URL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.RequestXml
member.summary: Gets the raw XML payload of the request.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.RequestHeaders
member.summary: Gets the request HTTP and custom headers.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.ResponseXml
member.summary: Gets the raw response content (XML or HTML/text in case of error).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.ResponseHeaders
member.summary: Gets the response HTTP headers.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.HttpStatusCode
member.summary: Gets the HTTP response status code.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.ExecutionTimeMs
member.summary: Gets the execution duration of the request in milliseconds.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets whether the request was executed successfully without throwing an exception.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.SoapFaultCode
member.summary: Gets the SOAP Fault code, if a fault was returned.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.SoapFaultString
member.summary: Gets the SOAP Fault string/reason, if a fault was returned.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.SoapFaultDetail
member.summary: Gets the SOAP Fault detail XML, if a fault was returned.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets the exception message if the request failed.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapDiagnosticLog.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when the request started.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.CircuitState
member.summary: Represents the state of the circuit breaker.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.CircuitBreakerOpenException
member.summary: Exception thrown when the circuit breaker is open.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.CircuitBreakerOpenException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResilienceEngine
member.summary: Thread-safe lightweight resilience engine for retrying and circuit breaking.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResilienceEngine.State
member.summary: Gets the current state of the circuit breaker.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResilienceEngine.#ctor(System.Int32,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResilienceEngine.RecordSuccess
member.summary: Records a successful request, resetting failures and closing the circuit.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResilienceEngine.RecordFailure(System.Exception)
member.summary: Records a request failure, potentially tripping the circuit breaker.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapResilienceEngine.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32,System.TimeSpan,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the specified asynchronous action with retries and circuit breaker checks.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlAnalysisReport
member.summary: Represents the generated report from analyzing a WSDL service.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlAnalysisReport.Services
member.summary: Gets the list of services found in the WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlAnalysisReport.Operations
member.summary: Gets the list of operation names discovered.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlAnalysisReport.ImportedSchemas
member.summary: Gets the list of schema namespaces imported.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlAnalysisReport.ComplexityScore
member.summary: Gets the complexity score of the SOAP service.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlAnalysisReport.Warnings
member.summary: Gets any warnings regarding security, version compatibility, or protocol constraints.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlAnalysisReport.ValidationIssues
member.summary: Gets validation issues found in the WSDL structure.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlAnalyzer
member.summary: Inspects and analyzes WSDL definitions.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlAnalyzer.Analyze(SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument)
member.summary: Generates a comprehensive inspection report for a parsed WSDL document.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for code generation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions.Namespace
member.summary: Gets or sets the target namespace of the generated classes. Default is "SmartWsdlKit.Generated".

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions.GenerateRecords
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to generate C# 9.0 Records instead of standard POCO classes. Default is false.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions.EnableNullableReferenceTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to make reference types nullable (C# Nullable Reference Types). Default is true.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlCodeGenerator
member.summary: Generates C# DTOs, interfaces, and clients from a WsdlDocument.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlCodeGenerator.Generate(SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument)
member.summary: Generates C# source code from WSDL metadata using default options.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlCodeGenerator.Generate(SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument,SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions)
member.summary: Generates C# source code from WSDL metadata with specified options.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlServiceInfo
member.summary: Lightweight discovery summary of a WSDL SOAP service.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlServiceInfo.ServiceName
member.summary: Gets the name of the service.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlServiceInfo.EndpointUrls
member.summary: Gets the list of concrete endpoint URLs.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlServiceInfo.SoapVersions
member.summary: Gets the SOAP version protocols supported.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlServiceInfo.SupportedOperations
member.summary: Gets the names of all operations supported.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlExplorer
member.summary: Service discovery utility to inspect SOAP endpoints without loading code structures.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlExplorer.Explore(System.String)
member.summary: Explores a WSDL address and returns a metadata summary.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlExplorer.ExploreAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Explores a WSDL address asynchronously and returns a metadata summary.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument
member.summary: Represents a parsed WSDL definition document supporting both WSDL 1.1 and 2.0.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.TargetNamespace
member.summary: Gets the target namespace of the WSDL document.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Services
member.summary: Gets the services exposed by this WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Bindings
member.summary: Gets the bindings defined in this WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Interfaces
member.summary: Gets the interfaces (portTypes in WSDL 1.1) defined in this WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Operations
member.summary: Gets all operations across all interfaces.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Schemas
member.summary: Gets the compiled XML Schema set containing all types defined or imported in this WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Imports
member.summary: Gets the list of raw imported documents (WSDLs/XSDs) resolved during loading.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a WSDL document from a URI (file or HTTP/HTTPS).

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.LoadAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a WSDL document asynchronously from a URI.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlService
member.summary: Represents a service in the WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlService.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the service.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlService.Documentation
member.summary: Gets the documentation, if any.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlService.Endpoints
member.summary: Gets the endpoints (ports) associated with this service.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlEndpoint
member.summary: Represents an endpoint (port in WSDL 1.1, endpoint in WSDL 2.0).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlEndpoint.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the endpoint.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlEndpoint.Binding
member.summary: Gets the binding associated with this endpoint.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlEndpoint.Address
member.summary: Gets the address location URL.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding
member.summary: Represents a binding in the WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the binding.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Interface
member.summary: Gets the associated interface (portType in WSDL 1.1).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Transport
member.summary: Gets the transport protocol URI (e.g. http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.SoapVersion
member.summary: Gets the SOAP version of this binding.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Style
member.summary: Gets the binding style ("document" or "rpc").

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Operations
member.summary: Gets operation-specific binding details.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBindingOperation
member.summary: Represents binding-specific details for an operation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBindingOperation.Name
member.summary: Gets the operation name.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBindingOperation.SoapAction
member.summary: Gets the SOAP action URI.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBindingOperation.Style
member.summary: Gets the soap:body binding style override ("document" or "rpc").

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlInterface
member.summary: Represents an interface (portType in WSDL 1.1, interface in WSDL 2.0).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlInterface.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the interface.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlInterface.Operations
member.summary: Gets the list of operations exposed by this interface.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation
member.summary: Represents a single service operation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the operation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.Interface
member.summary: Gets the associated WsdlInterface.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.InputMessageName
member.summary: Gets the input message name.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.InputElementName
member.summary: Gets the input element local XML name defined in XSD schemas.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.InputElementNamespace
member.summary: Gets the target namespace of the input XML element.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.OutputMessageName
member.summary: Gets the output message name.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.OutputElementName
member.summary: Gets the output element local XML name defined in XSD schemas.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.OutputElementNamespace
member.summary: Gets the target namespace of the output XML element.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.SoapAction
member.summary: Gets the soapAction associated with this operation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.Style
member.summary: Gets the style of the operation ("document" or "rpc").

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapVersion
member.summary: Supported SOAP protocol versions.

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.SoapVersion.Soap11
member.summary: SOAP 1.1 Protocol (http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/)

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.SoapVersion.Soap12
member.summary: SOAP 1.2 Protocol (http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope)

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.SoapVersion.Http
member.summary: Non-SOAP HTTP binding.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParser
member.summary: Parses WSDL 1.1 and 2.0 documents into a WsdlDocument structure.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParser.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads and parses a WSDL document from a URI.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParser.LoadAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads and parses a WSDL document asynchronously from a URI.
